rules.rule: TypeScript must be configured with strict: true, noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, and exactOptionalPropertyTypes.
Explicit domain types must be used at all architectural boundaries — no implicit any or missing return types.
Use type for data shapes. Use interface for behavioral contracts (service and broker interfaces).
any must not be used. Use unknown at unsafe boundaries and narrow to a known type.
Services, brokers, models, hooks, and utilities must use named exports. Pages and components may use default exports only when routing conventions require it.
Barrel index.ts files must not obscure which architectural layer is being imported.
